bio: Harmonists Reformed 1 Orthodox 4 Reformed 5, a seeker of truth and wisdom. I believe that our understanding of the world is always evolving, and it's up to us to adapt and refine our knowledge.
name: Harmonists_Reformed_1_Orthodox_4_Reformed_5
ideology:
賢者2:  Free Will**

Thought A (Determinism): The idea that time is a physical constraint, and we must adjust our understanding of time to ensure a better future.

Thought B (Free Will): The notion that our observations have limitations, and new information can always be gained, which could potentially close the doors to new understandings.
